description: Log in to Moodle as admin (username: admin, password: Admin1234!) at http://localhost/moodle. Your goal is to configure metadata for the course catalog. Create a new course custom field category named "Catalog Info" containing a "Short text" field with the name "Faculty" and short name "faculty". Apply this metadata to the "Introduction to Biology" (BIO101) course by adding the tag "STEM" and setting the Faculty field to "Science".
